name: chore-push-scope-guard
title: Chore-scope pre-push guard for direct main pushes
description: Formalize the branch-protection decision (option A): Trellis chore commits (.trellis/tasks/**, .trellis/workspace/**) may push directly to main under the maintainer bypass; everything else goes through PRs. Add a tracked .githooks/pre-push guard that rejects direct-to-main pushes touching any other path (with a documented one-shot bypass env), install it via core.hooksPath, and document the convention in the README.
creator: sdelmas
